document_id: Low-Income Housing Credits Taken Under General Statute ¬ß 105-129.42 (Article 3E) Processed During Calendar Year 2011

findings.description: Repeating page headers were moved to the end of the document instead of being removed.
findings.evidence: The header block from the top of PDF page 3 ('North Carolina Department of Revenue', 'Low-Income Housing Credits', etc.) appears at the very bottom of the HTML output on page 3, after the table and just before the source notes, creating a disconnected heading.
